PMDC Verified

Our Verified Doctors

Every prescription on Ilaaj AI is reviewed and approved by a licensed, PMDC-registered doctor. No AI-only prescriptions — ever.

Get Doctor-Verified Health Advice

Chat with our AI, get your symptoms assessed, and receive a doctor-verified prescription in 15-20 minutes.

Start Free Consultation
Ilaaj AI

Pakistan's first AI-powered health platform. Chat about your symptoms in any language, get AI triage, and receive doctor-verified prescriptions — affordable and accessible, 24/7.

Ilaaj AI is for general health consultations and non-emergency medical guidance. For emergencies, call 1122 (Rescue) or visit the nearest hospital.
